name: Ophir High Conviction Fund
analysis: OPH has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 22% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$2.7800. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$2.8500, stop A$2.5047, target A$3.1400 (0.84:1) — then trail it.
